title: navarretia spicata
intro: Navarretia spicata, also known as Spiked Navarretia, is a species of flowering plant in the phlox family, native to the western United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, specifically for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Navarretia spicata include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Navarretia spicata can be prepared as a tincture, salve, or infusion to harness its medicinal properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies.
